text: Hey, Anshu. I'm recording this video because I encountered an issue when I was trying to submit the appeal for brand name approval. Now, it shows. Does your account qualify? This is all it says. There is no. Not much information available on this page, but what I believe is we may need to complete the account registration process. We still need to. We still need to take two actions here. We need to provide the tax identity information, which I cannot do because I don't have the permission. And then secondly, I think we have to confirm the return address. So if you could please do these two things and then I will probably be able to submit the appeal. That is it for this video. Thank you for watching.
